findings.summary: PAEBrightness node DIVERGED (worst ddb 6.004 at brightness=100, t=0.9 in Objects__Curtains) via the FAITHFUL delta-response sweep in its real host. Matches fct/faithful/state.json (6.004). The node's param response (brightness multiply) diverges from FCP most at high amount + late time.
findings.oracle_truth_caveat: oracle_truth=gui: COLOR-family node; headless FCP has a MEASURED 13-19 dB headless-vs-GUI-export gap (see faithful/catalog.json ORACLE_TRUTH tag). Per faithful findings, the linear-working-space form that matches headless REGRESSES the GUI gate (the one truth). So this headless-delta divergence is NOT authorization to change the engine — the GUI GT (fct score) overrides. Tracked in faithful/ as PAEBrightness; parity surfaces the same verdict under the node view.
findings.note: Filter/generator nodes delegate to the faithful delta-response (in-host, pipeline-cancelling) because a static-source injection is UNFAITHFUL (synth.py lesson). Parity's unique contribution is the EXACT curve/value node verification; for image nodes it unifies the faithful verdict under one node registry.
